chunks.text:
Guidance for video-sharing platform providers on measures to protect users from harmful material
Guidance for video-sharing platform providers on measures to protect users from harmful material
Online safety
Illegal and harmful content
Information for industry
Video-sharing platform (VSP) regulation
Published:
6 October 2021
Last updated:
12 October 2023
This guidance is intended to support UK-established video-sharing platform (VSP) providers in understanding their regulatory obligations. These obligations include requirements to take measures to protect users from harmful material in videos.
Guidance for video-sharing platform providers on measures to protect users from harmful material (PDF, 860.3 KB)
We have also published guidance on the
control of advertising (PDF, 108.4 KB)
and
advertising harms and measures (PDF, 194.4 KB)
.
Video-sharing platforms: Ofcom's plan and approach
How we regulated video-sharing platforms and priorities for the last stretch of the regime before it was replaced by the online safety regime.
